      "type": "decision",
      "gap": "unapplied",
      "missing": "no requirement or roadmap applies this decision"
    },

      "id": "roadmap",
      "type": "roadmap",
      "gap": "unscoped",
      "missing": "this roadmap references no requirement"
    }

    "unscheduled": 1,
